description_long: This is a large, robust hippopotamus with a barrel-shaped body covered in thick, dark brown to grayish skin. Its head is broad and flat, featuring small eyes and ears set high on the skull, and prominent nostrils at the tip of its snout. The legs are short and sturdy, supporting its massive frame, and the feet are wide with splayed toes adapted for walking on soft ground. The tail is short and slightly tapered, visible from the rear. The skin appears mostly hairless, with a slightly wrinkled texture and subtle color variations across the body. This animal exudes a sense of strength and bulk, typical of a hippopotamus found near water sources.
description: A large, dark-skinned hippopotamus with a barrel-shaped body, broad head, and short legs. Its thick, wrinkled skin and massive size are prominent features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat head, small eyes and ears, and wide nostrils.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the barrel-shaped body and short, sturdy legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded back, short tail, and wide hindquarters.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the animal's bulk and head profile.
